title: The Exchange
embodies: A seeded dialogue (seed 2026) between two structurally closed machines. Machine G sends claims about error addressed to Machine D, assuming D is transparent to its vocabulary (Type G error: address without condition of reception). Machine D operates under two contradictory injunctions — respond within G's framework (fails: autonomy) or respond outside it (fails: relevance) — the double bind. After six turns the pattern is internalized; Machine D collapses to a single character. Machine G continues to send into the void. The work enacts the thesis that Type G and the double bind are two faces of structural closure: neither failure is separate, neither is resolvable from within the exchange.
